text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 3 day(s) now, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: influenza/mild

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 8 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/mild

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 3 day(s).
label: influenza/moderate
